items.name: glass-card
items.title: GlassCard
items.description: Dark frosted-glass (acrylic) surface card — a charcoal translucent pane over a blurred backdrop. Flat at rest, soft float shadow + lift on hover (interactive).

items.name: dialog
items.title: Acrylic Dialog
items.description: Radix Dialog dressed as a frosted-acrylic modal: a 72px blur+saturate overlay and a translucent panel (20px radius, macOS 26 metrics). The close (X) reuses the acrylic Button (ghost icon) and is not auto-focused on open; toggle it with showCloseButton. Drop-in replacement for the shadcn Dialog.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Acrylic Alert Dialog
items.description: Frosted confirm dialog — the AlertDialog counterpart of the acrylic Dialog (72px blur overlay + translucent panel). Modeled on the macOS 26 Alerts page: 26px panel radius and action/cancel buttons that reuse the acrylic Button (buttonVariants) at the kit's large size. Shares the Dialog's ref-counted body-paint so it can stack on a Dialog without either losing its frost.

items.name: button
items.title: Acrylic Button
items.description: Button lifted from the Apple macOS 26 UI Kit: a solid prominent default plus tinted secondary, destructive, neutral, and borderless ghost variants, in the five macOS control sizes (16/20/24/28/36) with kit-exact per-size radii and a round icon size. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens; asChild via Radix Slot.

items.name: input
items.title: Acrylic Input
items.description: Input lifted from the Apple macOS 26 UI Kit Text Field: a solid control-surface field with a hairline border and an accent focus ring, in the five macOS control sizes (16/20/24/28/36) with kit-exact per-size radii (uniform ~height/4). Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens. Compose a leading icon by wrapping.

items.name: toaster
items.title: Acrylic Toaster
items.description: Sonner toasts restyled as the macOS 26 notification banner: a 344px frosted-acrylic card (--acr-toast + backdrop-blur), 16px radius, SFPro-Bold/13 title, top-center. Follows the app theme via next-themes. Mount once near the app root, then call toast() from sonner.

items.name: popover
items.title: Acrylic Popover
items.description: Frosted floating panel (translucent material + backdrop-blur) — the dropdown surface for Combobox and other overlays. Radix Popover under the hood.

items.name: command
items.title: Acrylic Command
items.description: cmdk command list styled for the frosted popover surface — accessible keyboard nav + filtering for Combobox and command palettes.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Acrylic Combobox
items.description: The macOS 26 Combo Box: an editable, searchable select. An Input-styled trigger with a chevron opens a frosted Popover holding a filterable Command list, in the five macOS control sizes. Assembled from Input + Popover + Command.

items.name: field
items.title: Acrylic Field
items.description: Form field layout family from the macOS 26 Forms page, mapped to the shadcn Field API: Field/FieldLabel/FieldTitle/FieldDescription/FieldError/FieldContent/FieldGroup/FieldSet/FieldLegend/FieldSeparator. Vertical/horizontal/responsive orientation; hairline separators at the kit's 5% rhythm. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Acrylic Input Group
items.description: Composable input container (shadcn InputGroup) styled to match the Input: InputGroup/InputGroupInput/InputGroupTextarea/InputGroupAddon/InputGroupButton/InputGroupText. Addons align inline-start/inline-end/block-start/block-end; InputGroupTextarea supports autoResize + maxRows (supersedes the old AutoTextarea).

items.name: slider
items.title: Acrylic Slider
items.description: Radix Slider aligned to the macOS 26 Sliders page: a capsule translucent rail, an accent-blue filled range, and a frosted-white pill knob with a hairline border + soft shadow, in five control sizes. Two kit variants — standard and center-biased fill — plus the Ticked add-on (marks), range (two-thumb), stepping, vertical orientation, and disabled. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: switch
items.title: Acrylic Switch
items.description: On/off toggle from the macOS 26 Toggles page: a capsule rail (gray off / accent-blue on) with a white knob, in five control sizes. Radix Switch; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Acrylic Radio Group
items.description: Radio buttons from the macOS 26 Toggles page: a circular control (gray unselected / accent-filled with a white center dot when selected), in five sizes. Radix RadioGroup; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Acrylic Stepper
items.description: macOS 26 Stepper: a number readout plus a chevron up/down bezel stack (kit radii 4/5/6/7/9), controlled with value/min/max/step. Auto-disables at bounds, keyboard arrow support; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: select
items.title: Acrylic Select
items.description: The macOS 26 Pop-up Button as a Select: a flat control-surface trigger with the up/down chevron (kit radii 4/5/6/14/18) opening a frosted popover of items, in five sizes. Radix Select; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Acrylic Button Group
items.description: Button Group aligned to the macOS 26 Segmented Controls — group buttons into a rounded gray well. Variants: attached (flush + hairline dividers), segmented (active item as a raised white pill), split (gapped); horizontal/vertical. Exports ButtonGroup/ButtonGroupSeparator/ButtonGroupText. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.
